name: Polenta with Crispy Garlic and Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. When hot, add the garlic and sauté for 3 minutes until golden.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the cumin.
4. Set aside.
5. In a large pan, combine the water and salt. Bring to a boil.
6. Slowly add the cornmeal, whisking to blend.
7. When the mixture comes back to a boil, cover and reduce heat to medium-low.
8. Cook for about 20 minutes until the mixture starts to come away from the pan.
9. Stir often.
10. Remove from heat and stir in the garlic, chilies, and cheese.
11. Spread a lightly oiled 9-by-13 inch baking dish.
12. Refrigerate until set.
13. Cut the polenta into 8 pieces; cut each piece on the diagonal into 2 triangles.
14. Place on a lightly oiled baking sheet and broil on the top oven shelf for about 4 to 5 minutes on both sides.
15. The polenta should be browned and crispy on the outside and creamy on the inside.
